channel.title: Sean Aidan O'Toole
channel.description: Software engineer and data scientist — portfolio, blog, and resume.

item.title: Finding Value in the Draft: A Data Science Approach to Fantasy Football
item.description: How I built a SQL database, wrote Python regression models, and used machine learning to find undervalued NFL players for the 2026 season — and what I learned when my models kept breaking.

item.title: Building a Portfolio Website
item.description: How I made and deployed a website to host my resume and computer science blogs.
